ulasan.Ulasan: Be very careful with this organization. They prevent members from leaving real reviews on other members. If you have had a bad experience with a member they prevent you from discussing it or tell you they will kick you you. This keeps some pretty bad actors circulating in the group.
ulasan.teks_final: be very careful with this organization they prevent members from leaving real reviews on other members if you have had bad experience with member they prevent you from discussing it or tell you they will kick you you this keeps some pretty bad actors circulating in the group

ulasan.Ulasan: I’ve been a proud BNI member since 2015 and have been part of the Lakeside Elite Chapter for the past year, currently serving as Vice President. My experience with this group has been outstanding.  BNI is built on the principle of “Givers Gain” — the idea that by helping others, you ultimately help yourself. Those who embrace that mindset quickly see the value of genuine networking, relationship-building, and mutual support.  The Lakeside Elite Chapter is full of dedicated professionals who go above and beyond to help one another succeed. Like anything worthwhile, you get out of it what you put into it.  I highly encourage anyone to visit our chapter and see for yourself the positive, collaborative, and business-focused environment we’ve built together.
ulasan.teks_final: ive been proud bni member since and have been part of the lakeside elite chapter for the past year currently serving as vice president my experience with this group has been outstanding bni is built on the principle of givers gain the idea that by helping others you ultimately help yourself those who embrace that mindset quickly see the value of genuine networking relationship building and mutual support the lakeside elite chapter is full of dedicated professionals who go above and beyond to help one another succeed like anything worthwhile you get out of it what you put into it highly encourage anyone to visit our chapter and see for yourself the positive collaborative and business focused environment weve built together

ulasan.Ulasan: I have been a proud member of Business Networking International (BNI) and specifically the Providence Business Partners, Charlotte, NC chapter for almost 8 years.  This is a testimonial for BNI, but specifically for its’ Chief Financial Officer, Mary Kennedy Thompson.  Mary began regularly attending our, Providence Business Partners’ chapter, weekly BNI meetings, awhile back.  Over the months through her 45 second weekly commercials, her 10 minute presentation, 1 2 1’s and personal/professional conversations I have become more and more impressed with her as a professional and a person by learning more about her numerous, expansive past, current business accomplishments and investments to the underserved in our communities.  Her passion for BNI is evident every time she speaks about the organization and its’ members .  It radiates every time she speaks about it/them and the "givers gain" mentality.  Thank you Mary for helping so many of us, being our advocate and the experience, wisdom and professionalism you bring to BNI.

ulasan.Ulasan: BNI helped build my business over the last 5+ years from a solo web developer to a marketing agency with 200 clients and 10 FTEs
ulasan.teks_final: bni helped build my business over the last years from solo web developer to marketing agency with clients and ftes

ulasan.Ulasan: It started off so good but then took a nosedive during Covid. These organization had no clue what to do and ever since then think the next way to make up for the money they lost is to OVERCHARGE their members. $1000 to be in a group for a year in obscene! And not only that they raise their price about three months into the new year so even after you renew, they want you to give more money at the same price that you just renewed or you’re going to pay the new price which is obscene  Oh, and no guarantee that you’ll ever make that money back or that you’ll get referrals. Most people that have been in the chapters for over 10 years already have a group of people that they’re going to refer and even if they’re in your group, they don’t care About your business, they care about themselves. I thought I had a good power team, but I did not. My team failed to me as did the Bni chapter. Don’t buy into givers gain and don’t buy into building relationships… Because at the end of the day, people in that group in that chapter want to make money, that’s all it’s about. They will fake a relationship with you just so you will give them referrals instead it’s reverse psychology. If my Bni chapter actually showed any kind of concern towards me and my business, I would’ve stayed in that group. Because the end of the day I would’ve been making money in that group.  If you need a Networking group, find another group that’s more designed at a lower rate for joining and cares about trying to help your business not just help themselves.
ulasan.teks_final: it started off so good but then took nosedive during covid these organization had no clue what to do and ever since then think the next way to make up for the money they lost is to overcharge their members to be in group for year in obscene and not only that they raise their price about three months into the new year so even after you renew they want you to give more money at the same price that you just renewed or youre going to pay the new price which is obscene oh and no guarantee that youll ever make that money back or that youll get referrals most people that have been in the chapters for over years already have group of people that theyre going to refer and even if theyre in your group they dont care about your business they care about themselves thought had good power team but did not my team failed to me as did the bni chapter dont buy into givers gain and dont buy into building relationships because at the end of the day people in that group in that chapter want to make money thats all its about they will fake relationship with you just so you will give them referrals instead its reverse psychology if my bni chapter actually showed any kind of concern towards me and my business wouldve stayed in that group because the end of the day wouldve been making money in that group if you need networking group find another group thats more designed at lower rate for joining and cares about trying to help your business not just help themselves
